title: Golden Freddy Plush
description:
A texture pack changes the look of the Totem of undying
to Golden Freddy plush
body: ![Golden Freddy Plush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/267c8e2af2283d394afc76b55ae91cbc7e6d7cae_0.webp) # FEELING LONELY IN YOUR WORLD? - Well I have the perfect solution for you! - Introducing the Golden Freddy Plush - The perfect friend you can carry in your pocket # FEATURES - replaces default totem texture with a Golden Freddy plush - truly a long list ![DFP License banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f28dce390848e790af498daacd282533ec0bb5cf.png) # GAME VERSIONS - 1.19 - 1.19.4 - 1.20 - 1.20.6 - 1.21 - 1.21.4 # DEVELOPER NOTES This texture pack was originally posted by me on Planet Minecraft some time ago. I've decided to renew the texture pack and will post newer versions on here. [Original post](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/golden-freddy-plush-5661003/) # LINKS ![Ko-Fi Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81578c476131e8d131dc7aa2b58857525ea4f9af.png) ![Website Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d733ec80f664d05d32e895120b27255af2c43f4.png) ![Updates Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60f52b867a52a022b51e68dbba88e87fc4c5cdf.png)
